epigraph.quote: Robert had a lovely installation service with trumpets.

per_stop.quote: a field with cows & a smell of silage
We drove over the Clifton Suspension Bridge & zigzagged down
A stupid captain beached her in Ireland on her 5th voyage.
A pleasant campsite - helpful, information leaflets. Trees in the middle, a fence around with a boatyard on the other side
The Deanery is a very pretty house & garden. Pillars in the hall.
